languages.text: "Три звездных системы в Цинерус Малефикум, обретенные мной в странствиях, отныне именуются так: Слеза Солара, Игнис Корона и Врата Смелых. Эти новые горизонты прежде не знали власти Человечества. Владыки этих мест, лукавые нелюди, истребили друг друга, оказав мне немалую услугу. Артефакты, оставленные ими в качестве своеобразного наследия, бесценны. Один лишь клинок, снятый мной с иссохшего трупа эльдари на одной из планет во Вратах Смелых, таит в себе невероятную мощь — а ведь это лишь одна из множества реликвий".

traits.locale_text: "Три звездных системы в Цинерида Малефикарум, обретенные мной в странствиях, отныне именнуются так: Слеза Солара, Игнис Корона и Врата Смелых. Эти новые горизонты прежде не знали власти Человечества. Владыки этих мест, лукавые нелюди, истребили друг друга, оказав мне немалую услугу. Артефакты, оставленные ими в качестве своеобразного наследия, бесценны. Один лишь клинок, снятый мной с иссохшего трупа эльдари на одной из планет во Вратах Смелых, таит в себе невероятную мощь — а ведь это лишь одна из множества реликвий".

languages.text: "The three star systems in the Cinerus Maleficum that have come into my possession in my journeys shall henceforth be known as the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta. These are new horizons that have never before known Humanity's rule and whose rogue xenos overlords obliged me greatly by having already eliminated each other. The artefacts they left behind, a legacy of sorts, are priceless. A blade I took off a desiccated Aeldari corpse on one of the Fortis Porta worlds carries immense power within it, and it is but one among a wealth of relics."
languages.original_text: "Три звездных системы в Цинерус Малефикум, обретенные мной в странствиях, отныне именуются так: Слеза Солара, Игнис Корона и Врата Смелых. Эти новые горизонты прежде не знали власти Человечества. Владыки этих мест, лукавые нелюди, истребили друг друга, оказав мне немалую услугу. Артефакты, оставленные ими в качестве своеобразного наследия, бесценны. Один лишь клинок, снятый мной с иссохшего трупа эльдари на одной из планет во Вратах Смелых, таит в себе невероятную мощь — а ведь это лишь одна из множества реликвий".

traits.locale_text: "The three star systems in the Cinerus Maleficum that have come into my possession in my journeys shall henceforth be known as the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta. These are new horizons that have never before known Humanity's rule and whose rogue xenos overlords obliged me greatly by having already eliminated each other. The artefacts they left behind, a legacy of sorts, are priceless. A blade I took off a desiccated Aeldari corpse on one of the Fortis Porta worlds carries immense power within it, and it is but one among a wealth of relics."

"The three Cineris Maleficarum star systems that have come into my possession on my journeys shall henceforth be known as Solar's Tear, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta. Those are new horizons that never knew Humanity's rule before, and whose rogue xenos overlords obliged me greatly by having eliminated each other. The artifacts they left behind, as a legacy of sorts, are priceless. A blade I took off a desiccated Aeldari corpse on one of the Fortis Porta worlds carries immense power within it, and it is but one among a wealth of relics."

"The three star systems in Cineris Maleficarum that have come into my possession in my journeys shall henceforth be known as the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta. These are new horizons that have never before known Humanity's rule and whose rogue xenos overlords obliged me greatly by having already eliminated each other. The artifacts they left behind, a legacy of sorts, are priceless. A blade I took off a desiccated Aeldari corpse on one of the Fortis Porta worlds carries immense power within it, and it is but one among a wealth of relics."

"The three star systems in Cineris Maleficarum that have come into my possession in my journeys shall henceforth be known as the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta. These are new horizons that have never before known Humanity's rule and whose rogue xenos overlords obliged me greatly by having already eliminated each other. The artifacts they left behind, a legacy of sorts, are priceless. A blade I took off a desiccated Aeldari corpse on one of the Fortis Porta worlds carries immense power within it, and it is but one among a wealth of relics."

"The three star systems in the Cinerus Maleficum that have come into my possession in my journeys shall henceforth be known as the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta. These are new horizons that have never before known Humanity's rule and whose rogue xenos overlords obliged me greatly by having already eliminated each other. The artefacts they left behind, a legacy of sorts, are priceless. A blade I took off a desiccated Aeldari corpse on one of the Fortis Porta worlds carries immense power within it, and it is but one among a wealth of relics."

languages.text: “我在旅途中收入囊中的位于苍灰恶咒的那三个星系，从今往后将被命名为‘太阳之泪’、‘烈火之冠’和‘坚垒之门’。这些是从未被人类统治过的新疆域，而那些流亡的异形霸主已经把彼此杀了个干净，替我省了极大的麻烦。他们留下的遗物——某种意义上的遗产——价值连城。我曾在‘坚垒之门’的一颗星球上从一具干枯的艾达灵族尸体上取下一把剑，其中蕴含着极其强大的力量，而它不过是众多遗物中的一件。”
languages.original_text: "The three star systems in the Cinerus Maleficum that have come into my possession in my journeys shall henceforth be known as the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta. These are new horizons that have never before known Humanity's rule and whose rogue xenos overlords obliged me greatly by having already eliminated each other. The artefacts they left behind, a legacy of sorts, are priceless. A blade I took off a desiccated Aeldari corpse on one of the Fortis Porta worlds carries immense power within it, and it is but one among a wealth of relics."

traits.locale_text: “我在旅途中收入囊中的位于苍灰恶咒的那三个星系，从今往后将被命名为‘太阳之泪’、‘烈火之冠’和‘坚垒之门’。这些是从未被人类统治过的新疆域，而那些流亡的异形霸主已经把彼此杀了个干净，替我省了极大的麻烦。他们留下的遗物——某种意义上的遗产——价值连城。我曾在‘坚垒之门’的一颗星球上从一具干枯的艾达灵族尸体上取下一把剑，其中蕴含着极其强大的力量，而它不过是众多遗物中的一件。”

languages.text: «Los tres sistemas del Cineris Maleficarum que han pasado a mis manos durante mis viajes se conocerán como Lágrima de Solar, Corona de Ignis y Fortis Porta. Son nuevos horizontes donde la Humanidad no ha gobernado nunca y cuyos señores supremos xenos me hicieron el gran favor de haberse eliminado ya entre ellos. Los artefactos que dejaron, su legado, por llamarlo de alguna manera, no tienen precio. Una espada que saqué de un cadáver Aeldari reseco en uno de los mundos de Fortis Porta, encierra un gran poder, y es solo una de muchas reliquias».
languages.original_text: "The three star systems in Cineris Maleficarum that have come into my possession in my journeys shall henceforth be known as the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta. These are new horizons that have never before known Humanity's rule and whose rogue xenos overlords obliged me greatly by having already eliminated each other. The artifacts they left behind, a legacy of sorts, are priceless. A blade I took off a desiccated Aeldari corpse on one of the Fortis Porta worlds carries immense power within it, and it is but one among a wealth of relics."

traits.locale_text: «Los tres sistemas del Cineris Maleficarum que han pasado a mis manos durante mis viajes se conocerán como Lágrima de Solar, Corona de Ignis y Fortis Porta. Son nuevos horizontes donde la Humanidad no ha gobernado nunca y cuyos señores supremos xenos me hicieron el gran favor de haberse eliminado ya entre ellos. Los artefactos que dejaron, su legado, por llamarlo de alguna manera, no tienen precio. Una espada que saqué de un cadáver Aeldari reseco en uno de los mundos de Fortis Porta, encierra un gran poder, y es solo una de muchas reliquias».

languages.text: « Les systèmes à trois étoiles du Cineris Maleficarum, passés sous mon contrôle au fil de mes voyages, seront désormais connus sous les noms de Larme de Solar, Ignis Corona et Fortis Porta. Ce sont de nouveaux horizons, qui n'ont jamais connu le joug humain, et dont les belliqueux seigneurs xénos ont eu l'obligeance de s'entretuer. Les artéfacts qui constituent leur héritage et qu'ils ont abandonnés dans leur chute ont une valeur inestimable. Pour n'en citer qu'un, l'épée que j'ai arrachée au cadavre desséché d'un Aeldari sur l'un des mondes de Fortis Porta abrite un pouvoir immense, et il ne s'agit que d'une relique parmi tant d'autres. »
languages.original_text: "The three star systems in Cineris Maleficarum that have come into my possession in my journeys shall henceforth be known as the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta. These are new horizons that have never before known Humanity's rule and whose rogue xenos overlords obliged me greatly by having already eliminated each other. The artifacts they left behind, a legacy of sorts, are priceless. A blade I took off a desiccated Aeldari corpse on one of the Fortis Porta worlds carries immense power within it, and it is but one among a wealth of relics."

traits.locale_text: « Les systèmes à trois étoiles du Cineris Maleficarum, passés sous mon contrôle au fil de mes voyages, seront désormais connus sous les noms de Larme de Solar, Ignis Corona et Fortis Porta. Ce sont de nouveaux horizons, qui n'ont jamais connu le joug humain, et dont les belliqueux seigneurs xénos ont eu l'obligeance de s'entretuer. Les artéfacts qui constituent leur héritage et qu'ils ont abandonnés dans leur chute ont une valeur inestimable. Pour n'en citer qu'un, l'épée que j'ai arrachée au cadavre desséché d'un Aeldari sur l'un des mondes de Fortis Porta abrite un pouvoir immense, et il ne s'agit que d'une relique parmi tant d'autres. »

languages.text: "Yolculuklarımda elime geçen Cineris Maleficarum'daki üç yıldız sistemi bundan böyle Solar Gözyaşı, İgnis Corona ve Fortis Porta olarak bilinecek. Bunlar daha önce İnsanlığın yönetimini hiç tanımamış ve başıboş zeno efendileri birbirlerini zaten ortadan kaldırarak bana büyük bir iyilik yaptıkları yeni ufuklar. Geride bıraktıkları eserler, yani bir nevi miras paha biçilemez. Fortis Porta, dünyalarının birinde kurumuş bir Aeldari cesedinden aldığım bir bıçak içinde muazzam bir güç barındırıyor. Ki bu, zengin yadigârlardan yalnızca bir tanesi."
languages.original_text: "The three star systems in Cineris Maleficarum that have come into my possession in my journeys shall henceforth be known as the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta. These are new horizons that have never before known Humanity's rule and whose rogue xenos overlords obliged me greatly by having already eliminated each other. The artifacts they left behind, a legacy of sorts, are priceless. A blade I took off a desiccated Aeldari corpse on one of the Fortis Porta worlds carries immense power within it, and it is but one among a wealth of relics."

traits.locale_text: "Yolculuklarımda elime geçen Cineris Maleficarum'daki üç yıldız sistemi bundan böyle Solar Gözyaşı, İgnis Corona ve Fortis Porta olarak bilinecek. Bunlar daha önce İnsanlığın yönetimini hiç tanımamış ve başıboş zeno efendileri birbirlerini zaten ortadan kaldırarak bana büyük bir iyilik yaptıkları yeni ufuklar. Geride bıraktıkları eserler, yani bir nevi miras paha biçilemez. Fortis Porta, dünyalarının birinde kurumuş bir Aeldari cesedinden aldığım bir bıçak içinde muazzam bir güç barındırıyor. Ki bu, zengin yadigârlardan yalnızca bir tanesi."

languages.text: "Die drei Sternensysteme im Cineris Maleficarum, die auf meinen Reisen in meinen Besitz gelangt sind, sollen fortan als Träne von Solar, Ignis Corona und Fortis Porta bekannt sein. Sie sind neue Horizonte, denen die Herrschaft der Menschheit bisher fremd war, und deren Xenos-Hochlords mir den Gefallen erwiesen haben, sich gegenseitig auszuschalten. Die Artefakte, die sie mir gleichsam als Vermächtnis hinterließen, sind unbezahlbar. Einer Klinge, die ich einem verdorrten Aeldari auf einer der Welten von Fortis Porta abnahm, wohnen immense Kräfte inne, und sie ist nur eines von vielen Relikten."
languages.original_text: "The three star systems in Cineris Maleficarum that have come into my possession in my journeys shall henceforth be known as the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta. These are new horizons that have never before known Humanity's rule and whose rogue xenos overlords obliged me greatly by having already eliminated each other. The artifacts they left behind, a legacy of sorts, are priceless. A blade I took off a desiccated Aeldari corpse on one of the Fortis Porta worlds carries immense power within it, and it is but one among a wealth of relics."

traits.locale_text: "Die drei Sternensysteme im Cineris Maleficarum, die auf meinen Reisen in meinen Besitz gelangt sind, sollen fortan als Träne von Solar, Ignis Corona und Fortis Porta bekannt sein. Sie sind neue Horizonte, denen die Herrschaft der Menschheit bisher fremd war, und deren Xenos-Hochlords mir den Gefallen erwiesen haben, sich gegenseitig auszuschalten. Die Artefakte, die sie mir gleichsam als Vermächtnis hinterließen, sind unbezahlbar. Einer Klinge, die ich einem verdorrten Aeldari auf einer der Welten von Fortis Porta abnahm, wohnen immense Kräfte inne, und sie ist nur eines von vielen Relikten."

languages.text: 「わが旅の途上で手中に収めた、キネルス・マレフィクムの三つの恒星系は、今後『ソーラーの涙』『イグニス・コロナ』『フォルティス・ポルタ』と呼ばれることとなる。これらは、いまだ人類の支配を知らぬ新たなる地平であり、その異種族の支配者どもは、すでに互いを滅ぼし合っていてくれたことで、私に大いに便宜を図ってくれた。彼らが遺した遺物――いわば遺産は、値のつけられぬものだ。フォルティス・ポルタの一惑星で、干からびたアエルダリの死体から私が剥ぎ取った刃は、その内に途方もない力を秘めている。そして、それは数ある遺物の、ほんの一つにすぎぬのだ」
languages.original_text: "The three star systems in the Cinerus Maleficum that have come into my possession in my journeys shall henceforth be known as the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta. These are new horizons that have never before known Humanity's rule and whose rogue xenos overlords obliged me greatly by having already eliminated each other. The artefacts they left behind, a legacy of sorts, are priceless. A blade I took off a desiccated Aeldari corpse on one of the Fortis Porta worlds carries immense power within it, and it is but one among a wealth of relics."

traits.locale_text: 「わが旅の途上で手中に収めた、キネルス・マレフィクムの三つの恒星系は、今後『ソーラーの涙』『イグニス・コロナ』『フォルティス・ポルタ』と呼ばれることとなる。これらは、いまだ人類の支配を知らぬ新たなる地平であり、その異種族の支配者どもは、すでに互いを滅ぼし合っていてくれたことで、私に大いに便宜を図ってくれた。彼らが遺した遺物――いわば遺産は、値のつけられぬものだ。フォルティス・ポルタの一惑星で、干からびたアエルダリの死体から私が剥ぎ取った刃は、その内に途方もない力を秘めている。そして、それは数ある遺物の、ほんの一つにすぎぬのだ」
